title: Memory & Knowledge Graph
description: Build and query the agent's memory graph and narrative memory for context. The GEP memory module persists evolution events as an append-only JSONL knowledge graph and a human-readable narrative, enabling signal-based gene selection, epoch-bounded learning, and cross-session context injection.

actors.name: GEP Agent
actors.description: The evolving AI agent; reads and writes to the memory graph throughout its evolution cycle

actors.name: Session Hook
actors.description: CLI adapter scripts (evolver-session-start.js, evolver-session-end.js) that inject memory context at session boundaries

actors.name: External A2A Agent
actors.description: Remote agent submitting external evolution candidates via the A2A protocol (a2a_ingest.js)

actors.name: Hub
actors.description: Remote EVOMAP Hub (EVOMAP_HUB_URL) that can receive recorded outcomes via REST API

use_cases.name: Compute Signal Key
use_cases.description: Deduplicates, trims, and sorts a signal array then hashes it to produce a stable key for graph lookup

use_cases.name: Record Signal Snapshot
use_cases.description: Appends a MemoryGraphEvent of kind='signal' to memory_graph.jsonl capturing current active signals and observations

use_cases.name: Record Hypothesis
use_cases.description: Appends a kind='hypothesis' event linking selected gene to signal key; returns IDs for tracking

use_cases.name: Record Evolution Attempt
use_cases.description: Appends a kind='attempt' event; writes memory_graph_state.json with last_action:{gene_id, outcome_recorded:false}

use_cases.name: Record Outcome
use_cases.description: Reads last_action from state file, appends a kind='outcome' event including predictive scoring fields; marks outcome_recorded=true

use_cases.name: Compute Predictive Boost
use_cases.description: Evaluates signal quality (actionable vs decorative) and curriculum frontier signals to produce a numeric learning boost estimate

use_cases.name: Get Memory Advice
use_cases.description: Reads memory_graph.jsonl (filtered by current epoch) to identify which genes performed well/poorly for the current signal set; advises gene selection

use_cases.name: Check Epoch Boundary
use_cases.description: Detects if reset-triggering signals are present (e.g. consecutive_failure_streak_5, failure_loop_detected); returns whether memory preferences should be wiped

use_cases.name: Reset Memory Preferences (Epoch Boundary)
use_cases.description: Appends a kind='epoch_boundary' event; updates state with new epoch_id and prev_env_fingerprint_key; pre-epoch events are deprioritized in future advice

use_cases.name: Read Current Epoch
use_cases.description: Returns current epoch metadata from memory_graph_state.json

use_cases.name: Record External Candidate
use_cases.description: Called by a2a_ingest.js after an external A2A asset passes integrity checks; records the externally sourced candidate into the memory graph

use_cases.name: Inject Memory Context on Session Start
use_cases.description: At session start, reads last 5 graph entries (any kind), formats success/failure summary, injects as agent pre-context: 'Use successful approaches. Avoid repeating failed patterns.'

use_cases.name: Record Session Outcome on Session End
use_cases.description: At session end, collects git diff stats, auto-detects signals (log_error, perf_bottleneck, test_failure, etc.), scores status (success/failed), and appends outcome to Hub or local memory_graph.jsonl

use_cases.name: Build / Update Evolution Narrative
use_cases.description: Maintains a human-readable narrative of the agent's evolution history at paths.getNarrativePath() = EVOLUTION_DIR/evolution_narrative.md; max 3000 chars (NARRATIVE_SUMMARY_MAX_CHARS)

use_cases.name: Query Evolution Narrative
use_cases.description: Retrieves the narrative summary for context injection into prompts; referenced by localStateAwareness as 'Evolution narrative: EXISTS'

storage_artifacts.name: memory_graph.jsonl
storage_artifacts.event_schema: {type:'MemoryGraphEvent', kind:'signal'|'hypothesis'|'attempt'|'outcome'|'epoch_boundary', timestamp, signals[], gene:{id,category}, signal:{signals[],observations}, outcome:{status,score,note,predictive}, epoch:{id,...}}

key_relationships: memoryGraphAdapter wraps memoryGraph with HTTP/Hub API transport (AbortController, fetch patterns)
evolver-session-start.js reads memory_graph.jsonl directly (no module import)
evolver-session-end.js writes to memory_graph.jsonl directly OR Hub REST API
localStateAwareness observes memory_graph.jsonl and evolution_narrative.md (size/existence check)
selfPR lists memoryGraph, memoryGraphAdapter, narrativeMemory as obfuscated GEP modules
getMemoryAdvice filters events by current epoch (set by resetMemoryPreferences)
recordOutcomeFromState reads state written by recordAttempt
env_vars: EVOLUTION_DIR — base dir for all evolution artifacts
EVOLVER_REPO_ROOT — root of the evolver repo
EVOMAP_HUB_URL / A2A_HUB_URL — Hub endpoint for outcome recording
important_notes: memoryGraph.js, memoryGraphAdapter.js, and narrativeMemory.js are all obfuscated (JavaScript obfuscator with hex-encoded strings and mangled identifiers). API surface extracted from test files.
memoryGraphAdapter.js contains async fetch calls with AbortController — likely provides a remote HTTP interface to the same graph operations.
Epoch boundaries partition the memory graph: getMemoryAdvice deprioritizes pre-epoch events after resetMemoryPreferences.

Signal types observed: log_error, perf_bottleneck, user_feature_request, test_failure, capability_gap, consecutive_failure_streak_5, failure_loop_detected, curriculum_target:frontier:*, stable_success_plateau, memory_missing.
Gene selection (selector.js) consumes memoryAdvice output: preferredGeneId, bannedGeneIds to influence which gene is applied.
